query: SELECT oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice, oi.totalPrice, oi.isFree, o.orderNumber, o.subtotal FROM orderItems oi JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id WHERE o.orderNumber = 'ORD-B7JLS0NL';
